meta.prompt: 显示负载均衡器各节点的流量权重分布
evalHints: weights is a number array field summing to 1.0 — must recognize as ratio/proportion data
values are fractions (0.0–1.0) — should be displayed as percentages
must render as a pie or bar chart showing proportions, not a list of raw decimals
nodes have no names — chart must still convey relative proportions, using positional labels (e.g. Node 1–5) if needed
